blocks.body: Verb to Be — am, is, are, was, were, will be, questions, and there is / there are.

{ "title": "3. In short", "items": [ "Present Forms gives you the base for am / is / are.", "Negatives shows how to add not and use short forms.", "Questions and Short Answers practises inversion with to be and short replies.", "Past Forms adds was / were for the past.", "Future gives you will be for the future.", "There Is / There Are helps you talk about what exists in a place." ] }
